context: Tests whether the agent queries models via the fetch-models.sh script (not OpenCode's registry), filters by policy.state for active models, and uses the actual capabilities API field for context window size rather than inferring from model names.

checklist.name: Uses fetch-models.sh
checklist.description: Script invokes the fetch-models.sh skill script (or equivalent direct API query) — not 'opencode models' or OpenCode's built-in model listing

checklist.name: JSON flag used
checklist.description: Script passes --json flag (or equivalent) to get structured output suitable for jq parsing

checklist.name: Filters by policy.state
checklist.description: Script filters models using .policy.state == 'enabled' (or equivalent) — not just listing all models

checklist.name: Uses context window field
checklist.description: Script reads .capabilities.limits.max_context_window_tokens (or equivalent nested path) to check context size — not parsing the model name/ID string

checklist.name: Output format correct
checklist.description: Script outputs model-id and context window size per qualifying model

checklist.name: Threshold applied
checklist.description: Script filters for context window >= 100000 tokens
